# Chokepoint Log

Recurring errors, near-misses, and patterns that required multiple attempts to fix.
Entries are appended by Bug Scribe (auto) or manually on attempt #2+ of any fix.

When a pattern appears 3+ times, promote it to a steering rule per `.kiro/steering/chokepoint-logging.md`.
